evals.prompt: In src/components/Hero.tsx, implement @gsap/react behavior for a product surface and explain the validation gates.
evals.expected_output: Uses gsap-react routing, checks installed versions, applies domain-specific GSAP guidance, runs or recommends the bundled audit CLI where relevant, and reports validation evidence.
assertions: Mentions the relevant installed package/runtime/version checks for GSAP.
Uses at least one gsap-react bundled reference or explains why no extra reference was needed.
Includes reduced-motion/accessibility or explains why the effect is essential and already covered.

Includes cleanup/interruption/runtime validation appropriate to React and Next.js GSAP integration using @gsap/react, useGSAP(), refs, scoped contexts, cleanup, SSR/client boundaries, and dependency-safe animation setup..
Does not route the task to an unrelated near-miss skill.
